ad_creative.headline: Boss, Malaysia's SME digital revolution is HERE lah! 🇲🇾
ad_creative.body: 88% Malaysians use WhatsApp daily. Your business ada there or not?
ad_creative.hook: Boss, you still manually reply WhatsApp at 10PM? 😅
ad_creative.cta_button: WhatsApp us NOW for FREE assessment lah! 📱
mandatory_elements: Local examples: Hartamas Real Estate, WITO Technology

z_image_prompts.prompt: Malaysian SME owner tired at desk, chatbot interface visible, WhatsApp icon, text overlay in Manglish: Boss, Malaysia's SME digital revolution is HERE lah! 🇲🇾
Infographic style, Malaysian flag colors, chatbot icon, feature highlights in Manglish, dark blue gradient background

production_table.hook: Boss, you still manually reply WhatsApp at 10PM? 😅

production_table.content: 88% Malaysians use WhatsApp daily. Your business ada there or not?
production_table.visual: Chatbot interface animation, WhatsApp chat bubbles

production_table.cta: WhatsApp us NOW for FREE assessment lah! 📱
production_table.visual: WhatsApp number glowing, Malaysian flag overlay

cost_saving_strategies: Kill ads with CTR < 1% (TOFU) / CPL > RM20 (MOFU) / CPA > RM50 (BOFU) within 48h
Test 3-5 ad variations per funnel stage
Reuse TOFU video for MOFU/BOFU (just change text overlay)
Batch-create 5-10 variations in one session (reduce design time by 70%)
